nasb.text: For this reason also the people went and met Him, because they heard that He had performed this sign.

esv.text: The reason why the crowd went to meet him was that they heard he had done this sign.

cnv.text: 群眾因為聽見他行了這神蹟，就去迎接他。

ccb.text: 许多听过耶稣行这神迹的人都去迎接祂。

csbs.text: 众人之所以也去迎接他，是因为他们听说他行了这神迹。
